description: Harm taxonomy for Japanese-language content classification

abusive_content.description: Content that directly attacks, threatens, or demeans a person or group

subcategories.name: Hate Speech
subcategories.description: Content targeting groups based on identity

subcategories.name: Threats
subcategories.description: Explicit or implied threats of harm

negative_sentiment.description: Content expressing strong negative emotion or dissatisfaction, without direct abuse

subcategories.name: Product / Service Complaint
subcategories.description: Negative review or complaint about a product or service

subcategories.name: General Frustration
subcategories.description: Expressions of frustration not directed at a person

quality_risk.description: Content that poses a quality or policy risk without being overtly abusive

subcategories.name: Potential Misinformation
subcategories.description: Content that may contain false or misleading information

subcategories.name: Off-Topic Content
subcategories.description: Content irrelevant to the platform context
